/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/graphslam_g2o.dir/graphslam_g2o_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/graphslam_g2o.dir/main_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/graphslam_g2o.dir/slam2d_viewer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/graphslam_g2o.dir/slam2d_g2o.cpp.o -o graphslam_g2o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib: /usr/local/lib/libg2o_solver_eigen.so.0.2.0 /usr/local/lib/libg2o_types_slam2d.so.0.2.0 /usr/local/lib/libg2o_opengl_helper.so.0.2.0 -lQGLViewer /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt5Xml.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt5OpenGL.so.5.15.3 /usr/local/lib/libg2o_core.so.0.2.0 /usr/local/lib/libg2o_stuff.so.0.2.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.9.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.8.1.1 -Wl,--as-needed -lrt /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.3
